facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 700 reviews. At a restaurant most tourists scroll right past.

The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage Phú Quốc sits on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and the numbers don't lie. 700 people took the time to rate it. The average held at 4.7.

That's not luck. That's consistency.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
